reviews.comment:
Se  espera un poco ,por los turistas pero la atención es de  10.

(Translated by Google)
There's a bit of a wait because of the tourists, but the service is excellent.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNnbXVpXzFRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Lo bueno es que la gente de atención le pone onda y laburan a full! Hay estacionamiento, una hamacas para los chicos, maquina para inflar ruedas, acceso para sulla de ruedas, baños y para hacer compras de comidas, cafe etc con un espacio interior para sentarse a comer. Los baños están limpios. Pero tienen muy poco personal y poca variedad para hacer compras entonces es algo limitado y lento.

(Translated by Google)
The good thing is that the staff are friendly and work hard! There's parking, a swing set for kids, a tire pump, wheelchair access, restrooms, and a place to buy food, coffee, etc., with an indoor seating area. The restrooms are clean. However, they have very few staff and a limited selection of items, so it's somewhat restricted and slow.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNna3VMTE1REAE

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Lamentable.
Buena infraestructura. Un desperdicio por falta de preocupación a los clientes

(Translated by Google)
It's regrettable. The infrastructure is good, but it's a waste due to a lack of concern for customers.

reviews.comment:
Los baños siempre sucios, el bar no tenia comida ni siquiera envasada a las 14.30 hs. Almorzamos un pasito helado.

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms were always dirty, and the bar didn't have any food, not even packaged food, at 2:30 pm. We had a freezing cold lunch.

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
La atención es bastante mala.. parece que te están haciendo un favor al atender, cuando claramente es al revés.

(Translated by Google)
